data.text: All AC items already satisfied by committed code (commit 57e5e00e). The bead's REVIEW:BLOCK note refers to a stale earlier attempt; the resolver, schema, cache, and per-axis tests are all in HEAD and pass. Writing a no_changes rationale with a verification command.

input.content:
All five acceptance criteria are already satisfied in HEAD by commit
57e5e00e ("feat(agentmetrics): GraphQL agentMetrics(window, groupBy)
resolver + revision-keyed cache [ddx-2bb01b91]"). The earlier
REVIEW:BLOCK note on this bead reflects a stale attempt that committed
only an evidence file; the actual resolver, schema, cache, and per-axis
tests landed in 57e5e00e and remain present:

AC1 (agentMetrics in GraphQL schema):
  cli/internal/server/graphql/schema.graphql:2886 — query field
  cli/internal/server/graphql/schema.graphql:2899 — AgentMetricsWindow
  cli/internal/server/graphql/schema.graphql:2909 — AgentMetricsAxis
  cli/internal/server/graphql/schema.graphql:2921 — AgentMetricsRow
  cli/internal/server/graphql/schema.graphql:2949 — AgentMetricsResult

AC2 (4 axes MODEL/HARNESS/PROVIDER/TIER):
  cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_agent_metrics.go:171 (axisKey)

AC3 (3 windows 24h/7d/30d, default 7d, no all-time):
  cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_agent_metrics.go:79 (windowDuration)
  schema.graphql:2886 (default W7D)

AC4 (revision-keyed cache surviving ADR-004 archive):
  cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_agent_metrics.go:35 (cache)
  cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_agent_metrics.go:238 (fingerprint
  hashes run-store + executions + beads-archive.jsonl + beads.jsonl)

AC5 (per-axis tests):
  cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_agent_metrics_test.go
    TestAgentMetrics_GroupByModel
    TestAgentMetrics_GroupByHarness
    TestAgentMetrics_GroupByProvider
    TestAgentMetrics_GroupByTier
    TestAgentMetrics_WindowExcludesOldAttempts
    TestAgentMetrics_RevisionCache
    TestAgentMetrics_RevisionSurvivesArchiveMove
    TestAgentMetrics_InvalidEnumsRejected

All eight tests pass on this worktree's HEAD. The worktree contains no
in-scope diff to commit.

verification_command: cd cli && go test ./internal/server/graphql/ -run AgentMetrics -count=1

data.text: No code changes needed — bead's ACs are already satisfied in HEAD by commit 57e5e00e (schema, resolver, revision-keyed cache, and all per-axis tests). Wrote `no_changes_rationale.txt` with a verification command (`go test ./internal/server/graphql/ -run AgentMetrics`) which passes all 8 tests locally.
